required_validator_change: Update EXPECTED_NEXT_PHASE_ID, EXPECTED_NEXT_PHASE_CLASS, live-route consistency checks, and any PURG-PRE candidate-only assumptions, then add explicit PURG-PRE route-admission artifact validation.
risk_if_changed: Changing the validator without synchronized schema, Transition Table, and active-context updates can admit a live-route mutation that still fails canonical policy or creates a false PASS.
